title: Grandpa Eddie
html:
Stub. Yahir's grandfather — likely the boat-owner referenced in 2025 08 29 boat.

What we know

  • Listed in 2025 08 21 austin's goodbye-list as "Grandpa Eddie / Karen" (Karen possibly partner).
  • Probable seller of the Bayliner 2450 Sun Bridge Ciera detailed in 2025 08 29 boat — owner had heart issues and didn't want to risk going.

Open questions

  • Mom's side or dad's side of the family?
  • Karen — partner, second wife?
